title: My English Voice: Grade 4 Capstone Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Letters and packages that are sent or delivered.
choices: mail
citizen
sweat
rounds.answer: mail
rounds.explanation: mail: Letters and packages that are sent or delivered.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Small white or brown grains that people cook and eat.
choices: mail
citizen
rice
rounds.answer: rice
rounds.explanation: rice: Small white or brown grains that people cook and eat.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A person who cleans and takes care of a building.
choices: citizen
janitor
mail
rounds.answer: janitor
rounds.explanation: janitor: A person who cleans and takes care of a building.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A way people talk and write to share ideas and feelings.
rounds.answer: language

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A part of a plant, like pepper, that adds flavour to food.
rounds.answer: spice

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A person who builds things from wood.
rounds.answer: carpenter

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.answer: I received a letter in the mail today.
I took a deep breath before I started to speak.
She ate rice with her chicken.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

choices: An idea or opinion in your mind.
Facts or details about something.
Help or work done for others.
To find or learn something new.
rounds.answer: Help or work done for others.
rounds.explanation: The library started a free book service for the town.

choices: An idea or opinion in your mind.
To bring something to a person or place.
To find or learn something new.
What you know or learn.
rounds.answer: To bring something to a person or place.
rounds.explanation: The mail carrier will deliver our letters.

choices: A shape that curls round and round, moving out from the centre.
How fast something happens, or how much of it there is.
To go forward or to keep going.
To run fast on four legs, like a horse.
rounds.answer: To run fast on four legs, like a horse.
rounds.explanation: The horse began to gallop across the field.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.target: Explain three portfolio choices and support each choice with a specific example.
I took a deep breath before I started to speak.
six audience questions in complete, relevant sentences.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The website has useful information about our town.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The snail moved in a spiral on the ground.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The engineer drew plans for a new bridge.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'service' mean in this unit?
choices: Help or work done for others.
Letters and packages that are sent or delivered.
A person who belongs to a country and has rights there.
rounds.answer: Help or work done for others.
rounds.explanation: service: Help or work done for others.

rounds.prompt: What does 'laborer' mean in this unit?
choices: Letters and packages that are sent or delivered.
A person who belongs to a country and has rights there.
A person who does hard work, often with their hands.
rounds.answer: A person who does hard work, often with their hands.
rounds.explanation: laborer: A person who does hard work, often with their hands.

rounds.prompt: What does 'citizen' mean in this unit?
choices: The clear water that comes from your skin when you are hot.
A person who belongs to a country and has rights there.
Letters and packages that are sent or delivered.
rounds.answer: A person who belongs to a country and has rights there.
rounds.explanation: citizen: A person who belongs to a country and has rights there.

games.title: Word Type Power
games.description: Identify how each vocabulary word works in English.

choices: Verb
Noun
Adjective
rounds.answer: Verb
rounds.explanation: accelerate is used as a verb in this dictionary sense.

choices: Noun
Verb
Adjective
rounds.answer: Adjective
rounds.explanation: doubtful is used as a adjective in this dictionary sense.

choices: Adjective
Noun
Verb
rounds.answer: Noun
rounds.explanation: surface is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

pairs: A person who belongs to a country and has rights there.
The clear water that comes from your skin when you are hot.
Food made of two pieces of bread with meat, cheese, or vegetables inside.
Help or work done for others.
An idea or opinion in your mind.
To go forward or to keep going.
A person who does hard work, often with their hands.
Feeling very worried, with lots of worried thoughts.
Things that are used for a special job or task, like tools or machines.

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

choices: A deep valley with steep sides, often with a river at the bottom.
The clear water that comes from your skin when you are hot.
The soft hair that covers some animals' bodies.
The top or outside part of something.
rounds.answer: The clear water that comes from your skin when you are hot.
rounds.explanation: After running in the sun, I wiped the sweat from my face.

choices: A part of a plant, like pepper, that adds flavour to food.
A place where bread and cakes are made and sold.
Food made of two pieces of bread with meat, cheese, or vegetables inside.
Small white or brown grains that people cook and eat.
rounds.answer: Food made of two pieces of bread with meat, cheese, or vegetables inside.
rounds.explanation: I ate a chicken sandwich for lunch.

choices: A part of a plant, like pepper, that adds flavour to food.
A place where bread and cakes are made and sold.
A young sheep, or the meat from it.
New and clean; not old or spoiled.
rounds.answer: A young sheep, or the meat from it.
rounds.explanation: We cooked lamb and rice for the guests.

games.title: Unit Mission
games.description: Finish with a mixed challenge across the whole unit.

choices: A person who belongs to a country and has rights there.
Letters and packages that are sent or delivered.
To have the same opinion, or to say yes to something.
To keep doing something without stopping.
rounds.answer: Letters and packages that are sent or delivered.
rounds.explanation: I received a letter in the mail today.

choices: A way people talk and write to share ideas and feelings.
To get something you want, or to become better at something.
To have the same opinion, or to say yes to something.
To keep doing something without stopping.
rounds.answer: A way people talk and write to share ideas and feelings.
rounds.explanation: English is a language that many people speak around the world.

choices: A small amount of water in the air or on a surface.
The air you take in and let out of your lungs.
The soft hair that covers some animals' bodies.
The top or outside part of something.
rounds.answer: The air you take in and let out of your lungs.
rounds.explanation: I took a deep breath before I started to speak.
